message:
fix: KillSession idempotent + ensureMayorInfra on attach

Cherry-picked from PRs #1926 and #1924 (closed due to snowball scope):

- tmux.KillSession: return nil when session already gone or no server,
  eliminating ~8 false-positive errors/hour in telemetry from cleanup races
- mayor attach: auto-start daemon and Dolt if not running, non-fatal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
